rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH DEL ROSARIO ET AL VS. CONCHITA MACABEO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Conchita Macabeo'S Motion For Set Aside/Vacate Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2020, line 1. Defendant Conchita Macabeo'S Motion For Set Aside/Vacate Judgment is GRANTED. Judgment on Plaintiff's complaint is set aside on equitable grounds. Trial is re-set for December 7, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM BYERLY VS. 2100 GREEN STREET, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2020, line 3. DEFENDANT 2100 GREEN STREET, INC. DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for plaintiff to re-assert its claim for injunctive relief as a remedy. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ARTI KUTHIALA ET AL VS. GINA VELEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Dante Cecchini And Cecchini Realty Co.'S Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2020, line 4. Defendants Dante Cecchini And Cecchini Realty Co.'S Demurrer is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the cause of action for elder abuse. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that a property manager is a caretaker/custodian within the meaning of the elder abuse statutes. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. The remaining causes of action subjected to this demurrer are sufficiently stated. =(501/CFH)

Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that a property manager is a caretaker/custodian within the meaning of the elder abuse statutes. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. The remaining causes of action subjected to this demurrer are sufficiently stated. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ARTI KUTHIALA ET AL VS. GINA VELEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Dante Cecchini And Cecchini Realty Co.'S Motion To Strike Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2020, line 4. Defendants Dante Cecchini And Cecchini Realty Co.'S Motion To Strike Complaint is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently supported by factual allegations. =(501/CFH)
